events.title: BILD Diwali Celebration 2025
events.description: Join the BILD family for our annual Diwali celebration — an evening of light, colour, music, and togetherness. Enjoy traditional food, live entertainment, and connect with fellow British Indians in Dubai. A family-friendly event celebrating the festival of lights in true British Indian style.
events.shortDescription: Annual Diwali night with dinner, music and festivities for the whole family.

events.title: BILD Summer Social
events.description: An informal summer meet-up for BILD members and their families. Great conversations, good food, and the chance to grow your British Indian network in Dubai. All members welcome.
events.shortDescription: Informal summer social for members and families at Dubai Marina.

events.title: BILD Diwali 2024
events.description: Our inaugural Diwali celebration brought together over 100 BILD members and their families for an unforgettable evening of food, music, and celebration.
events.shortDescription: Our inaugural Diwali celebration with 100+ members.
